meta.name: Voice of Customer Aggregator
meta.description: Pull feedback from multiple channels (reviews, surveys, support, social) and produce a weekly Voice of Customer digest with top themes and quotes.

parameters.content:
## 34 — Voice of Customer Aggregator

**Required:**
- VOC_SHEET_ID: columns date, source (review|survey|support|social|interview), text, segment, sentiment, tags
- OpenAI API, SMTP Email, NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Every Friday at 15:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: Synthesize customer feedback into a Voice of Customer digest. Extract themes with supporting quotes. Preserve verbatim evidence. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 🗣️ Voice of Customer Digest {{ $json.period }}: {{ $json.count }} feedback items, {{ ($json.themes||[]).length }} themes
